smoke.detail: pixi run pytest tests/test_model_admetlab3.py -q -> 14 passed (mocked wash->/api/admet->taskId->/api/admetCSV round-trip: transport, retry/backoff, predict fallback, async CSV polling, raw CSV+JSON caching, positional row alignment, per-record error isolation, OutputRecord validation); full fast tier still 303 passed.

note: ADMETlab 3.0 HTTP client built (stdlib urllib; retry/backoff + /api/single/admet fallback + <=5 rps throttle + raw-response cache to /zfs) with a generic CSV parser and a placeholder schema. F-6 residue: the literal 119-column header needs ONE live /api/admetCSV call; outbound network was denied by the headless sandbox (laptop and via box), so the header is uncaptured -> needs_aaran (README carries the TODO). No box env/lock required for api-model kind.
